originalTitle: Prince Harry sued for defamation by charity Sentebale he co-founded
title: Prince Harry sued for defamation by charity Sentebale he co-founded
content: Prince Harry left the charity last year in an acrimonious dispute over how Sentebale was being managed.

originalTitle: Chimpanzees in Uganda locked in vicious 'civil war', say researchers
title: Chimpanzees in Uganda locked in vicious 'civil war', say researchers
content: The once close-knit community of Ngogo chimpanzees have been at loggerheads for the last eight years.

originalTitle: Popular Tanzanian musician Matonya charged with rape in Kenya
title: Popular Tanzanian musician Matonya charged with rape in Kenya
content: The 43-year-old denies the charge and has been released on bail and had to surrender his passport.

originalTitle: Djibouti’s President Guelleh wins sixth straight term in office
title: Djibouti’s President Guelleh wins sixth straight term in office
content: The longtime ruler, in power since 1999, has secured 97 percent of the vote, according to official results.

content: Senior Iranian officials arrive in Islamabad for ceasefire talks with the United States.

title: Pakistan ambassador speaks to Al Jazeera on eve of US-Iran talks
content: Pakistan’s ambassador to the US said weeks of intense diplomatic efforts have led to a shared commitment from all sides.

title: Lyse Doucet: Historic US-Iran talks must bridge deep distrust
content: Face-to-face talks would mark the highest-level engagement between Iran and the US since the 1979 Islamic Revolution.

title: Final push for votes as challenger to Hungary's Orbán scents victory
content: As Péter Magyar's opposition movement leads in the polls, tens of thousands of anti-Orbán supporters fill Heroes' Square in Budapest.

originalTitle: Artemis II mission was a triumph - now comes the hard part
title: Artemis II mission was a triumph - now comes the hard part
content: The mission was almost flawless but there are considerable obstacles ahead before a Moon landing.

title: West Ham have fresh hope - but Spurs now in uncharted territory
content: West Ham's thumping win over Wolves not only boosts their own Premier League survival hopes, but plunges Tottenham into the drop zone - and to new depths.

title: Could Guardiola's best and Arteta's worst month decide title?
content: As the Premier League season approaches its finale, April could be the defining month for leaders Arsenal and closest challengers Manchester City. BBC Sport looks at the stats to explain why.

title: De Zerbi 'not surprised' by reaction to Greenwood comments
content: Tottenham manager Roberto de Zerbi says he was "not surprised" by the reaction from supporters over comments he made about Mason Greenwood.
